title: RAND Europe
description: RAND Europe is a not-for-profit research institute whose mission is to help improve policy and decision making through research and analysis.
text:
RAND Europe is an independent, not-for-profit research organisation whose mission is to help improve policy and decision-making through research and analysis. We benefit the public interest through the impact and wide dissemination of over 100 projects per year.
RAND Europe, a research unit of RAND, is comprised of three legal entities, RAND Europe (UK) CIC, RAND Europe (EU) AISBL and Stichting RAND Europe NL. RAND® is a registered trademark. © 2026 RAND Corporation.
